reason: Successfully sent a message to the QA-20260707-025910-xug9 agent and verified it received a correct response mentioning "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut application with sidebar containing agents list
Found and clicked the "QA-20260707-025910-xug9" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded, showing agent status as "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status shows "idle" which satisfies the requirement
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully submitted and the page navigated to a new chat session titled "Math Question Quick Check"
Waited for response — Agent responded within 8 seconds (well within the 3-minute limit)

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — The agent's response is "4", which is the correct answer to 2+2. Screenshot saved as qa-test-response.png showing the full conversation with the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and the response "4" clearly visible
